rules.threat: A single compromised encryption layer exposes Kusto data because double encryption is not enabled at cluster creation.
rules.title: Enable double encryption on Kusto clusters
requiredActions: Set double_encryption_enabled = true on the Kusto cluster.

rules.threat: A leaked workspace key allows agents to ingest or read logs without Azure AD, undermining log integrity and access auditing.
rules.title: Disable local auth on Log Analytics workspaces
requiredActions: Set local_authentication_disabled = true on the Log Analytics workspace.

rules.threat: Traffic to and from known-malicious IPs and domains passes uninspected because threat-intelligence mode is not set to Deny.
rules.title: Set Azure Firewall threat-intel mode to Deny
requiredActions: Set threat_intel_mode = "Deny" on the Azure Firewall.

rules.threat: A firewall policy passes traffic to known-malicious endpoints because its threat-intelligence mode is not set to Deny.
rules.title: Set firewall policy threat-intel mode to Deny
requiredActions: Set threat_intelligence_mode = "Deny" on the Azure Firewall policy.

rules.threat: Intrusion attempts pass undetected because the firewall policy has no intrusion detection (IDPS) block configured.
rules.title: Enable IDPS on firewall policies

remediate.snippet: Add an intrusion_detection block with mode = "Deny" (requires Premium SKU).

requiredActions: Add an intrusion_detection block (mode Deny) to the firewall policy.

rules.threat: An attacker exploits a web vulnerability because the WAF policy is in Detection mode and does not block malicious requests.
rules.title: Set WAF policy to Prevention mode

remediate.snippet: Within the policy_settings block set mode = "Prevention".

requiredActions: Set policy_settings.mode = "Prevention" on the WAF policy.

rules.threat: A disabled WAF policy provides no protection, leaving the fronted application fully exposed to web attacks.
rules.title: Keep WAF policies enabled

remediate.snippet: Within policy_settings ensure enabled = true.

requiredActions: Set policy_settings.enabled = true on the WAF policy.

rules.threat: An attacker installs a bootkit or unsigned boot component because secure boot is not enabled on the VM.
rules.title: Enable secure boot on Linux VMs
requiredActions: Set secure_boot_enabled = true on the Linux VM.

rules.threat: Lack of a virtual TPM prevents measured boot and remote attestation, weakening detection of boot-level tampering.
rules.title: Enable vTPM on Linux VMs
requiredActions: Set vtpm_enabled = true on the Linux VM.

rules.threat: An attacker installs a bootkit because secure boot is not enabled on the Windows VM.
rules.title: Enable secure boot on Windows VMs
requiredActions: Set secure_boot_enabled = true on the Windows VM.

rules.threat: Lack of a virtual TPM prevents measured boot and attestation on the Windows VM, weakening boot-tamper detection.
rules.title: Enable vTPM on Windows VMs
requiredActions: Set vtpm_enabled = true on the Windows VM.

rules.threat: A compromised key remains in use indefinitely because the disk encryption set does not automatically rotate to the latest key version.
rules.title: Enable auto key rotation on disk encryption sets
requiredActions: Set auto_key_rotation_enabled = true on the disk encryption set.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the Automation account, which can run privileged runbooks, over the public internet.
rules.title: Disable public network access on Automation accounts
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the Automation account.

rules.threat: A leaked Automation key authenticates without Azure AD, allowing unauthorized runbook execution.
rules.title: Disable local auth on Automation accounts
requiredActions: Set local_authentication_enabled = false on the Automation account.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the API Management gateway directly because it is not deployed in an internal virtual-network mode behind controlled ingress.
rules.title: Deploy API Management in internal VNet mode

remediate.snippet: Set virtual_network_type = "Internal" and configure virtual_network_configuration with a dedicated subnet.

requiredActions: Set virtual_network_type = "Internal" on the API Management instance.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the Purview governance account, which catalogs sensitive data locations, over the public internet.
rules.title: Disable public network access on Purview accounts
requiredActions: Set public_network_enabled = false on the Purview account.

rules.threat: An on-path attacker downgrades the SCM/Kudu deployment endpoint to weak TLS and intercepts deployment credentials.
rules.title: Require TLS 1.2 on Linux web app SCM endpoint

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

requiredActions: Set site_config.scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the Linux web app.

rules.threat: Outbound traffic bypasses network controls and egress inspection because all traffic is not routed through the integrated virtual network.
rules.title: Route all web app traffic through the VNet

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set vnet_route_all_enabled = true (requires VNet integration).

requiredActions: Set site_config.vnet_route_all_enabled = true on the Linux web app.

rules.threat: An on-path attacker downgrades the SCM/Kudu deployment endpoint to weak TLS and intercepts deployment credentials.
rules.title: Require TLS 1.2 on Windows web app SCM endpoint

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

requiredActions: Set site_config.scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the Windows web app.

rules.threat: An attacker captures plaintext deployment credentials because the web app allows unencrypted FTP rather than FTPS-only.
rules.title: Enforce FTPS-only on Windows web apps

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set ftps_state = "FtpsOnly" or "Disabled".

requiredActions: Set site_config.ftps_state to FtpsOnly or Disabled on the Windows web app.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the Windows web app directly over the internet because public network access is enabled.
rules.title: Disable public network access on Windows web apps
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the Windows web app.

rules.threat: An on-path attacker downgrades the function app SCM endpoint to weak TLS and intercepts deployment credentials.
rules.title: Require TLS 1.2 on Linux function app SCM endpoint

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

requiredActions: Set site_config.scm_minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the Linux function app.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the Linux function app over the internet because public network access is enabled.
rules.title: Disable public network access on Linux function apps
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the Linux function app.

rules.threat: An on-path attacker intercepts traffic because the Windows function app accepts plaintext HTTP.
rules.title: Enforce HTTPS-only on Windows function apps
requiredActions: Set https_only = true on the Windows function app.

rules.threat: An on-path attacker downgrades the Windows function app connection to obsolete TLS and intercepts data.
rules.title: Require TLS 1.2 on Windows function apps

remediate.snippet: Within site_config set minimum_tls_version = "1.2".

requiredActions: Set site_config.minimum_tls_version = "1.2" on the Windows function app.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the application without presenting a client certificate because mutual TLS client-cert mode is not set to Required.
rules.title: Require client certificates on Linux web apps
requiredActions: Set client_certificate_mode = "Required" (with client_certificate_enabled = true) on the Linux web app.

rules.threat: Accidental or malicious deletion of table/blob data is unrecoverable because no delete-retention policy is configured under blob_properties.
rules.title: Configure blob delete retention on storage accounts

remediate.snippet: Within blob_properties add a delete_retention_policy block with days set to 7 or more.

requiredActions: Add blob_properties.delete_retention_policy with an adequate retention period on the storage account.

rules.threat: Data at rest in the dedicated SQL pool is exposed if storage media is compromised because transparent data encryption is disabled.
rules.title: Enable transparent data encryption on Synapse SQL pools
requiredActions: Set data_encrypted = true on the Synapse SQL pool.

rules.threat: An attacker who can read ARM/template deployments retrieves secrets because the key vault is enabled for template deployment access.
rules.title: Disable template-deployment access to key vaults
requiredActions: Set enabled_for_template_deployment = false on the key vault.

rules.threat: An attacker leverages VM deployment access to retrieve secrets because the key vault is enabled for deployment.
rules.title: Disable VM deployment access to key vaults
requiredActions: Set enabled_for_deployment = false on the key vault.

rules.threat: An attacker's destructive action cannot be reverted because the SQL database has no point-in-time short-term backup retention configured.
rules.title: Configure short-term retention on SQL databases

remediate.snippet: Add a short_term_retention_policy block with retention_days set to an adequate value (7 or higher).

requiredActions: Add a short_term_retention_policy block to the SQL database.

rules.threat: An attacker reaches the Redis cache over the public internet because public network access is enabled.
rules.title: Disable public network access on Redis caches
requiredActions: Set public_network_access_enabled = false on the Redis cache.

rules.threat: App Service outbound traffic bypasses egress inspection because not all traffic is routed through the integrated virtual network.
rules.title: Route all App Service traffic through the VNet

remediate.snippet: Set the app setting WEBSITE_VNET_ROUTE_ALL = "1" (or vnet_route_all_enabled on newer resources) with VNet integration.

requiredActions: Enable VNet route-all (WEBSITE_VNET_ROUTE_ALL = 1) on the App Service.

rules.threat: A production account on free tier is created with relaxed defaults and capacity limits that can mask abuse and lead to denial of service.
rules.title: Disable free tier on production Cosmos DB accounts
requiredActions: Set enable_free_tier = false on production Cosmos DB accounts.

rules.threat: An attacker brute-forces SQL logins because the managed instance allows mixed authentication instead of Azure-AD-only.
rules.title: Require Azure-AD-only auth on SQL managed instances
requiredActions: Set azuread_authentication_only = true on the SQL managed instance AAD administrator.

rules.threat: Long-lived SAS tokens are tolerated because the account SAS policy expiration action only logs rather than blocks expired-policy violations.
rules.title: Set SAS expiration action on storage accounts

remediate.snippet: Add a sas_policy block with a bounded expiration_period and expiration_action = "Log" or stronger.

requiredActions: Add a sas_policy block defining a SAS expiration_period on the storage account.
